sn.e: Today I had a terrible day.
"I had a bad day," I sigh.

sn.s: "Perdí mi teléfono y llegué tarde al trabajo."
sn.e: "I lost my phone and arrived late to work."

sn.s: "Me siento frustrado y un poco triste."
sn.e: "I feel frustrated and a little sad."
"Relax. We all have days like this."

sn.s: "Mañana va a estar mejor. Ya verás."
Hablar de lo que siento me quita un peso.
sn.e: Talking about what I feel takes a weight off me.
"Thanks for listening to me," I tell him.

sn.s: Un buen amigo y un poco de español: eso ayuda.
sn.e: A good friend and a little Spanish: that helps.
